name: Concise Reschedule Request With Time Constraints
description: A terse beginner user wants to move an upcoming appointment and gives limited information initially. The agent should efficiently collect the minimum required scheduling details and confirm an updated appointment window.
initialMessage: Need to move my appointment. Friday won't work.
expectedOutcome: The agent identifies the existing appointment context, asks for the needed availability details, and confirms a reschedule or the next concrete scheduling step.
